case_title: C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. BURL WALKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $262.50 FILED BY C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, BURL D.B.A. B & W PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
